settings.title: How We Hand a Project Back to You
settings.excerpt: A good launch is not the end of our job, it is the moment your team takes the wheel without fear.
settings.body:
People sometimes ask what happens after we ship. The honest answer is that the last week of every build is about you, not us.

We record a short walkthrough of how to edit each page type, write a plain language guide to the parts that are not obvious, and sit down with whoever will own the site after we leave.

Our developers, Mara and Devin, treat the handoff as a feature. If your team cannot confidently update the homepage on their own, we have not finished.
